title: Overall protocol for top-down CZE-MS/MS of human spleen tissue
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8trjo","text":"Overview description of the process for acquiring top-down CZE-MS/MS data on human spleen tissue","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Spleen tissue was provided by University of Florida TMC. Tissue was collected and prepared according to the following: Case Processing SOP (Spleen) by Marda Jorgensen
Tissue Homogenization and GELFrEE for Top-Down Proteomics by Kelleher KRG KRG Research Group
Untargeted Top-down Proteomics by CZE-MS/MS on Eclipse by Kelleher KRG KRG Research Group
Top-down proteomics data analysis on the NRTDP TDPortal by Kelleher KRG KRG Research Group
creator: Kelleher KRG KRG Research Group
